title: Complete Web Development Bootcamp
description: Learn full-stack web development from scratch. Build responsive websites and modern web apps using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and Node.js.

title: UI/UX Design Masterclass
description: Master UI/UX fundamentals, wireframing, prototyping, and modern design systems using Figma. Create professional user-friendly designs.

title: Digital Marketing & SEO Fundamentals
description: Learn SEO, Facebook Ads, Google Ads, content marketing, and branding. Start promoting products and services effectively online.

title: Advanced React & Next.js Development
description: Learn advanced React patterns, Next.js App Router, server components, authentication, API routes, and deployment best practices.

title: Graphic Design Essentials
description: Learn Photoshop basics, Canva design techniques, typography, color theory, and logo creation for social media and business branding.

title: Business & Freelancing Blueprint
description: Learn freelancing strategy, client communication, proposal writing, pricing, and how to build a strong portfolio to earn online.
